heart_collection.title: Use the Lifesteal system to collect hearts from PvP victories — build to maximum heart count

subtitle.text: You have been through the void. You understand now that some things can come back from it.

description: The Lifesteal mod operates on a PvP economy of hearts.
Defeating another player takes a heart from them and adds it to yours.
The floor is 3 hearts — you cannot be reduced below 3.
Crafted from Lifesteal materials, it restores a player who has hit 0 hearts.
In the context of Ch15, it is a symbol:
you went into the void and came back.
You now understand what it means to return from that place.
The crystal is proof that return is possible.
The Scarlet King tries to manifest through players with 100+ Manifestation.
The Revive Crystal is the counter-mechanism.
If someone falls to the void, you can bring them back.
This is the difference between the twelfth civilization and the thirteenth.
→ Collect hearts using the Lifesteal system [check]
